summary: methylKit is an R package for DNA methylation analysis and annotation from high-throughput bisulfite sequencing.
The reconstruct function reconstructs a corrected methylBase object from a corrected percent methylation matrix.
The calculateDiffMeth function is the main function to calculate differential methylation.
The overdispersion parameter in logistic regression accounts for variance greater than expected by the binomial distribution.
Overdispersion correction is not applied by default in calculateDiffMeth. The F-test is automatically used when overdispersion correction is applied in calculateDiffMeth.
Setting overdispersion="MN" applies overdispersion correction in calculateDiffMeth.
